interval.notes: UTC 22:00 = KST 07:00, runs 2h before 09:00 morning send slot
UTC 08:00 = KST 17:00, runs 2h before 19:00 evening send slot

parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.auth_user_id,
  s.session_id,
  s.product_session_id,
  s.status,
  ps.id        AS ps_id,
  ps.session_number,
  ps.title     AS ps_title,
  lp.id        AS product_id,
  lp.name      AS product_name,
  lp.meta      AS product_meta,
  lp.slug      AS product_slug,
  pr.discord_id,
  pr.display_name,
  pr.timezone,
  pr.discord_dm_unsubscribed
FROM nv2_sessions s
JOIN nv2_product_sessions  ps ON ps.id  = s.product_session_id
JOIN nv2_learning_products lp ON lp.id  = ps.product_id
JOIN nv2_profiles          pr ON pr.auth_user_id = s.auth_user_id
WHERE s.status IN ('pending', 'in_progress')
  AND s.auth_user_id NOT LIKE 'anon:%'
  AND (pr.discord_id IS NOT NULL AND pr.discord_dm_unsubscribed = false)
ORDER BY s.auth_user_id, s.created_at DESC

INSERT INTO nv2_schedules
  (auth_user_id, schedule_type, delivery_url, message_body, scheduled_at, status)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.auth_user_id }}', 'cheer', '{{ $json.delivery_url }}', '{{ $json.message_body }}', '{{ $json.scheduled_at }}', 'pending')
